query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN serviceId LIKE 'SVC-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as placeholder_ids, SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress = 'Unknown Location' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unknown_loc, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'terminated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as terminated FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra';
